name: Egg Noodle Dish
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the noodles; drain.
2. Put in a greased 9x13 inch pan.
3. Break up corned beef into fine pieces.
4. Sprinkle onion on.
5. Cut up the cheese into chunks.
6. Spread everything around.
7. Spoon soup out in several piles.
8. Pour can full of milk over everything.
9. Mix together and bake at 275 degrees for 45 to 60 minutes, or until cheese is melted.
